entry.title: Anthropic principle
entry.content:
Is using our own existence as a basis for constructing physical theories merely sophistry, or can it genuinely advance the development of science?

The anthropic principle usually appears together with the naturalness problem.

There are many different formulations of the anthropic principle. The version often used for “sophistry” is: the...

entry.title: Hello world
entry.content: This is my first post. Welcome to my site!
